title: Cremanthodium principis

intro: Cremnathodium principis, commonly known as Snowy Mountain Cremanthodium, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally used in Tibetan medicine, this plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
